name: Prof. Dr. Lena Richter
involvement_summary: Prof. Dr. Lena Richter is a psychologist who has been directly interviewed by KuchenTV in several 'Ungescriptet' episodes. They discussed topics including mental health, digital addiction, and psychological aspects of modern society. KuchenTV has personally met with Prof. Richter for in-depth conversations.
key_events: Discussions on mental health and digital addiction
